name: gallery
title: Gallery
description: Compound product image gallery/lightbox primitives (Root, Carousel, Image, Thumbnails, ThumbnailImage, Dots) on embla, sharing a context. Compose them directly or use the gallery1/gallery2 presets.

files.content: {@render children()}

<script lang="ts">
	import * as Carousel from '$lib/components/ui/carousel/index.js'
	import { cn } from '$UTILS$.js'
	import { getGalleryContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'

	let { class: className = '', children }: { class?: string; children: Snippet } = $props()
	const gallery = getGalleryContext()
</script>

<Carousel.Root
	opts={gallery.opts}
	plugins={gallery.plugins}
	setApi={(a) => (gallery.mainApi = a)}
	class={cn('min-w-0 flex-1', className)}
>
	<Carousel.Content>{@render children()}</Carousel.Content>
</Carousel.Root>

{#snippet defaultImg({ src, alt }: { src: string; alt: string; index: number })} {/snippet} {#each gallery.items as item, i (item.key)} {@render (child ?? defaultImg)({ src: item.url, alt: item.alt, index: i })} {/each}

<script lang="ts">
	import * as Carousel from '$lib/components/ui/carousel/index.js'
	import { cn } from '$UTILS$.js'
	import { getGalleryContext } from './ctx.svelte.js'
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte'

	let {
		class: className = '',
		orientation = 'horizontal',
		children
	}: {
		class?: string
		orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
		children: Snippet
	} = $props()
	const gallery = getGalleryContext()
</script>

<Carousel.Root
	{orientation}
	opts={{ dragFree: true }}
	setApi={(a) => (gallery.thumbApi = a)}
	class={cn('w-full', className)}
>
	<Carousel.Content>{@render children()}</Carousel.Content>
</Carousel.Root>
{#each gallery.items as item, i (item.key)} {/each}

{#if gallery.items.length > 1}
{#each gallery.items as item, i (item.key)} {/each}
{/if}

import Root from './gallery.svelte'
import Carousel from './gallery-carousel.svelte'
import Image from './gallery-image.svelte'
import Thumbnails from './gallery-thumbnails.svelte'
import ThumbnailImage from './gallery-thumbnail-image.svelte'
import Dots from './gallery-dots.svelte'

export { Root, Carousel, Image, Thumbnails, ThumbnailImage, Dots }
